doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: partial
reason: The document presents accurate legal interpretations of the ADEA, but it is not a verbatim copy of an official EEOC Compliance Manual section as organized by the agency.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 90
REASON: While the document accurately reflects the ADEA's core legal principles and EEOC enforcement logic, the EEOC Compliance Manual is organized into numbered sections (e.g., Section 15 on Race/Color Discrimination) and does not contain a discrete "Section 8" dedicated solely to the ADEA in this format.
